name_cn:
C'EST DIOR Small Handbag 'Stripes' ❣️❣️❣️
This C'est Dior handbag is a new arrival for Fall 2023, elegant and classic. Crafted from natural color and denim blue natural grass, featuring the classic Dior Marinière pattern from the ready-to-wear collection. Bucket bag silhouette with CD Lock closure, featuring a rotary letter D, safely holds various daily items. Small size with top handle and adjustable, detachable chain strap with leather detail, can be carried by hand for a relaxed look.
CD Lock closure
Detachable chain strap with adjustable leather detail
Top detachable leather handle
Style: 2272
Size: 17×7×18cm
